title: Gondola
description: Replaces pigs with a mountable ski lift gondola!
body:
# _Gondola_ - Ski lift model

## About
As the name suggests, _Gondola_ replaces the pig's model and texture with a unique gondola, making the resource pack inevitable for building winter stuff like a ski slope.

## How to...
1. Enable the resource pack
2. Spawn a pig
3. To ride, rightclick the gondola with a saddle
4. Rightclick again to sit in the gondola

## Dependencies
- [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
- [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
